metadata.description: Multi-platform Sega Dreamcast, Naomi and Atomiswave emulator

doc.source: The Steam Deck payload is the immutable Flycast v2.6 commit with the complete hash-pinned upstream submodule tree. Nix replaces the older nixpkgs source and carries no host, Flatpak, libretro, or binary fallback.
doc.platforms: Only x86_64-linux is an owned package target. Other hosts fail at Nix evaluation.
doc.rendering: The directly linked game phase receives the final upright windowbox before Flycast draws OSD or routes video. The post-UI phase runs immediately before imguiDriver presents. UI, failure, and teardown paths emit no inactive reports.
